title: 100 Yard Rolls of 50mm Poly Ribbon! Florist Polypropylene PP Plastic[Silver]
features: These 50mm poly ribbon rolls are a floristry classic.
Poly ribbons are waterproof, brightly coloured and can be thinned out to make narrower strips with ease.
Great ribbon in long rolls at an unbeatable price.
